basic_details.job_title: Malda Medical College Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Malda Medical College Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Malda Medical College Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with P.G degree / Diploma / DNB from Recognized University
qualification.details: MBBS with P.G degree / Diploma / DNB from Recognized University

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident posts at Malda Medical College?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and candidates need to attend the interview on 28th May 2026. There is no separate application deadline mentioned.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a Post Graduate degree, Diploma, or DNB from a recognized university to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Resident posts is 44 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts, distributed across various specializations like General Medicine, Chest Medicine, G&O, and Anaesthesiology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the interview venue on the specified date.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in General Medicine (2 posts), Chest Medicine (1 post), G&O (1 post), and Anaesthesiology (1 post).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The Senior Resident positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Malda Medical College, Malda, West Bengal. The exact venue address should be confirmed from the official notification.
